text: The body follows the mind. Decide first. Move second.
author: StrongBase

text: Every strong person was once a beginner who kept going.
author: StrongBase

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: You don't have to feel ready. You just have to begin.
author: StrongBase

text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: StrongBase

text: Discomfort is the currency of growth. You're paying right now.
author: StrongBase

text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: The goal is not to feel good during the set. The goal is to get better.
author: StrongBase

text: Focus on the next rep, not the last one.
author: StrongBase

text: Your effort right now is silent progress. Trust the process.
author: StrongBase

text: Comfort zones don't build strength. You're exactly where you need to be.
author: StrongBase

text: One more. Then one more after that.
author: StrongBase

text: You have been doing hard things your whole life. This is just one more.
author: StrongBase

text: Excellence is not a destination. It's a standard you practice daily.
author: StrongBase

text: The mind quits long before the body does. Stay in it.
author: StrongBase

text: You showed up. That is always enough to start, and often enough to finish.
author: StrongBase

text: Every workout is a vote for the person you are becoming.
author: StrongBase

text: Effort spent never goes to waste. It compounds quietly.
author: StrongBase

text: You made time for yourself today. That is not a small thing.
author: StrongBase

text: Strength isn't built in a single session. It's built in the decision to return.
author: StrongBase

text: You didn't wait for motivation. You showed up anyway. That's the real skill.
author: StrongBase

text: Rest now. The work is done. Let it become part of you.
author: StrongBase

text: Tomorrow's version of you is grateful for what you did today.
author: StrongBase

text: The discipline to finish is rarer than the desire to start. You have both.
author: StrongBase

text: You are not the same person who started this session. Good.
author: StrongBase

text: Recovery is not weakness. It is where adaptation happens.
author: StrongBase

text: The body repairs in rest what effort breaks down. This is the plan working.
author: StrongBase

text: Active recovery is not a compromise. It is a strategy.
author: StrongBase

text: Rest with intention. You are not skipping — you are building.
author: StrongBase

text: Even Marcus Aurelius slept. Let that be enough permission to recover.
author: StrongBase
